title.v: thông tin các khóa học ngắn hạn

command.text: declare @message nvarchar(4000) &CommandWhenBeforeLoad; select @message = 'set$ViewPanelEmployeeID(this);loading$PITrainingCourses(this);' select isnull(@message,'') as message return
declare @message nvarchar(4000) &CommandWhenBeforeLoad; select @message = 'set$ViewPanelEmployeeID(this);' select isnull(@message,'') as message return

declare @ma_khoa varchar(33) select @ma_khoa = ma_khoa from hredt where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0 if exists(select 1 from hrdtkh where ma_khoa = @ma_khoa) begin select a.ma_mh, b.ten_mh%l, a.loai_hinh_dt, d.ten_loai%l, a.ma_dvdt, c.ten_dvdt%l, a.ngay_hoc1, a.ngay_hoc2, a.so_gio from hrdtkh a with(nolock) left join hrdmmh b on a.ma_mh = b.ma_mh left join hrdmdvdt c on a.ma_dvdt = c.ma_dvdt left join hrdmlhdt d on a.loai_hinh_dt = d.ma_loai where ma_khoa = @ma_khoa return end

declare @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512), @$exists nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã khóa học %s đã có hoặc lồng nhau hoặc không hợp lệ.' else N'The course code %s is invalid or already exists.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'V' then N'Bản ghi này được chuyển từ phân hệ khác sang, không thể xóa được.' else N'Can not delete this record, It was inserted automatically.' end

if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and ma_khoa = @ma_khoa and tag = 0) begin select 'ma_khoa' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_khoa)) as message return end
if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec) select @stt_rec0 = max(stt_rec0), @line_nbr = max(line_nbr) from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec else select @stt_rec0 = '000', @line_nbr = 0
exec dbo.FastBusiness$HRM$GetRowID @stt_rec0 output, @line_nbr output select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID, @tag = 0

if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec0 <> @stt_rec0 and ma_khoa = @ma_khoa and tag = 0) begin select 'ma_khoa' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_khoa)) as message return end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0 and tag = 0
if exists(select 1 from hredt where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0 and tag = 1) begin select @$deleteConflict as message return end

action.text: if exists(select 1 from hrdtkh where ma_khoa = @ma_khoa) begin select a.ma_mh, b.ten_mh%l, a.loai_hinh_dt, d.ten_loai%l, a.ma_dvdt, c.ten_dvdt%l, a.ngay_hoc1, a.ngay_hoc2, a.so_gio from hrdtkh a with(nolock) left join hrdmmh b on a.ma_mh = b.ma_mh left join hrdmdvdt c on a.ma_dvdt = c.ma_dvdt left join hrdmlhdt d on a.loai_hinh_dt = d.ma_loai where ma_khoa = @ma_khoa return end
